overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a hooded character in ancient Egyptian attire walking along a desert shoreline at night. The character traverses between the water's edge and red sand dunes under bright moonlight, with distant mountains visible throughout the journey.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the shoreline with calm water to the right and red sand dunes to the left under moonlight

entered.detail: large red sand dunes forming the coastline terrain
calm reflective water of the sea or large lake
bright full moon illuminating the night sky
dark mountain range visible on the horizon
scattered dry bushes and small vegetation on the sand

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a desert shoreline at night, with calm water reflecting moonlight on the right and red sand dunes rising on the left. The full moon illuminates the scene from above while distant mountains silhouette the horizon.

events.description: character begins ascending the sand dune, moving away from the water's edge into the desert terrain

agents.ego_description: climbing up the rippled sand dune, leaving the shoreline behind and heading into the desert interior

entered.detail: wind-formed ripple patterns in the red sand

segments.scene_description: The character moves away from the shoreline and ascends into the red sand dunes. The water disappears from view as the terrain rises, revealing more of the rippled desert sand and scattered dry bushes under the moonlight.

events.description: character reaches the dune top and changes direction, beginning the descent back toward the shoreline
character descends the dune slope, with the water becoming visible again in the distance

agents.ego_description: traversing the dune top with panoramic mountain views, then descending back toward the water's edge

entered.detail: scattered rocks and stone formations on the sandy terrain

segments.scene_description: At the top of the dune, the character surveys the landscape with mountains prominent in the background, then turns and descends back toward the shoreline. Rocky outcrops appear among the sand as the water gradually comes back into view.

agents.ego_description: walking along the rocky shoreline with gentle waves lapping at the shore and the moon reflecting on the water

entered.detail: small waves breaking gently on the rocky and sandy shore

segments.scene_description: The character returns to the shoreline, walking along the water's edge where small waves lap against the rocks and sand. The red dunes now rise in the distance to the left while the calm water stretches out to the right under the moonlit sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that tracks a character from a moonlit shoreline up into towering red dunes and back down to the water's edge. It begins with the character walking along the coast, where calm water reflects the full moon on the right and red sand rises on the left against a silhouette of distant mountains. As the character moves away from the shore, the terrain ascends into the dunes, causing the water to disappear from view and revealing rippled sand and scattered dry bushes. The scene then shifts as the character reaches the summit to survey the landscape before descending through rocky outcrops that signal the return of the coastline. Finally, the camera follows the character back to the shoreline, where small waves lap against the rocks and the red dunes recede into the distance under the bright night sky.
